title: Remote assistance input fix (clicks, keyboard, right-click)
description:
Remote control now maps admin clicks to the full shared tab viewport (not just portal-root), accounts for letterboxed video in the admin panel, and passes right-clicks and typed text through to the customer session.

Who is affected: anyone using Remote help screen share on pipeshare.live / pipeshare.net.
changeLog: Fix click coordinate mapping for tab screen share (letterbox + full viewport).
Right-click (context menu) forwarded from admin remote viewport.
Keyboard typing inserts text into focused inputs on customer side.
Pointer events dispatched alongside mouse events for better UI compatibility.
